init_hook: which agent-browser > /dev/null 2>&1 || (pnpm add -g agent-browser > /dev/null 2>&1 && agent-browser install > /dev/null 2>&1)
[ ! -d node_modules ] && echo 'installing frontend deps...' && pnpm install --silent || true
echo "node $(node -v | sed 's/v//') pnpm $(pnpm -v) rust $(rustc --version 2>/dev/null | cut -d' ' -f2 || echo 'n/a') | bat eza fzf rg fd tree jq glow btop curl lazygit gh"
